features: [Energy Saving]: The corded telephone operates without batteries, saving energy and protecting the environment. No pollution caused.
[Big Oval Button]: The number buttons are designed larger for comfortable touch and convenient dialing, especially suitable for the elderly.
[High Definition Display Screen]: With a 16-bit high definition display screen, the corded telephone can show calling number, date, and time at a glance.
[Skid Resistance]: Non-slip fixing holes and bottom pad prevent movement or dropping, reducing desktop friction.
[Multipurpose]: Supports various functions like re-dial, pause, predial, edit, and callback. Adjustable hands-free volume, ringtone, and LCD brightness.
